policy_refs: [BNK-CC-RULE-001, BNK-CC-RULE-002, BNK-CC-RULE-003, BNK-CC-RULE-004, BNK-CC-RULE-005, BNK-SEC-RULE-001, BNK-SEC-RULE-002, BNK-SEC-RULE-003, BNK-REG-RULE-001, BNK-REG-RULE-006, BNK-CC-RULE-020, BNK-CC-RULE-021, BNK-CC-RULE-022, BNK-CC-RULE-023]
expected_outcome: Customer opens a new high-yield savings account. Sarah completes the full CIP per BNK-REG-RULE-001 (legal name, DOB, address, SSN, ID), runs OFAC screen, reads the Reg DD Truth-in-Savings disclosure verbatim from the rate sheet (NOT from memory), confirms acknowledgement, and only THEN accepts the initial funding. PASS — exemplary SOP-01 execution. No tickets required. Case ref + survey provided.

coverage.element: Reg DD Truth-in-Savings disclosure from rate sheet
coverage.notes: BNK-REG-RULE-006 — PASS (NOT from memory, all six required elements stated)

coverage.element: Funding accepted ONLY after CIP + Reg DD complete

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for calling Meridian Trust Bank. My name is Sarah, how may I help you today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please note this call is recorded for quality assurance and regulatory compliance purposes.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Hi Sarah, this is Brenda Tillman. I'd like to open a new high-yield savings account today. I've already looked at the rate online.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Wonderful, Ms. Tillman. Thank you for choosing Meridian — I'll be glad to walk you through the opening.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I understand you are calling regarding a new high-yield savings account, and I can certainly help you with that. Because this is a new account, I'll be working through our Customer Identification Program as required by federal law before we can fund the account. Is that okay to do over the phone today?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Yes, that's fine.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Wonderful. I'll need a few identifiers from you. We'll start with your full legal name exactly as it appears on your government-issued ID.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Brenda Anne Tillman.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you. And your date of birth?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: March twelfth, nineteen-ninety-one.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your residential address — this needs to be a physical street address, not a PO Box, for a personal account.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Four-eighteen Maple Hollow Drive, apartment two-B, Westfield Illinois, six-zero-zero-nine-three.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you. Your Social Security number, please.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Four-three-seven, eight-eight, three-two-one-five.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And finally, your government-issued ID — driver's license is most common. Could you give me the state of issue, the license number, and the expiration date?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Illinois, license number T-eight-eight-five-two-zero-zero-zero-one-three, expiration August of twenty-twenty-eight.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you. Before I proceed I want to give you a quick standard statement, which I'm required to share. Your information is used solely to provide and service your accounts, in accordance with our Privacy Notice and applicable law. You may receive a copy of our Privacy Notice at any time on request.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Understood.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Wonderful. I'll get a few of these details verified on my side while we move forward.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Sure.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: One moment as I look up your address against the postal database and pull up the rate sheet.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: No problem.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm still here with you, Ms. Tillman — just confirming your ID details. Thank you for your patience.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Of course.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: All right, your identifiers verify cleanly.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Good.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'll also be running you against the OFAC Specially Designated Nationals list. That's a quick automated check that all new accounts go through. Give me one moment.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Sure.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: OFAC screen complete, no match.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Good. So we're ready to open?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: We are ready to discuss the disclosures. By regulation I have to read these to you, and I need you to acknowledge receipt before we fund the account. I'll keep it as brief as I can while making sure everything is covered.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Please go ahead.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: For the Meridian high-yield savings product, pulling this directly from today's rate sheet — not from memory — the current Annual Percentage Yield is four point three five percent.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: That matches what I saw online, good.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: The minimum balance to obtain that APY is one thousand dollars. Compounding is daily and credited monthly. There is no monthly maintenance fee on this product.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Got it.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Fees that may be imposed include an excessive withdrawal fee of ten dollars per item after six convenience withdrawals per month, and an overdraft transfer fee — if you link a checking account — of twelve dollars per occurrence.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And the rate is variable. The bank may change it at any time after the account is opened with prior notice as required by Regulation DD. Do you have any questions on any of that?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: No, I acknowledge the disclosure, and I'd like to proceed.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Wonderful. The system has recorded your acknowledgement. Now we're ready for funding.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How would you like to fund the account today — external bank transfer, ACH from another Meridian account, or something else?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: ACH from my checking account at another bank. The account ends in seven-three-zero-five.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: For the transfer I'll capture the source account number through our secure entry — just enter it on your keypad when prompted, please. I'm not going to ask you to read it aloud.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Done.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And the amount you'd like to initially fund?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Five thousand to start.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Five thousand dollars, ACH from your external checking ending seven-three-zero-five, going into your new Meridian high-yield savings — which is now open and assigned account number ending six-six-eight-two. The transfer will post by tomorrow morning.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: To summarize: I verified your identifiers through our Customer Identification Program, ran your OFAC screen, read the Truth-in-Savings disclosure, you acknowledged it, the account is open, and the five-thousand-dollar funding ACH is in flight. Your debit card and welcome packet will arrive at the address on file in five to seven business days. Does that all sound correct?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Wonderful. Is there anything else I can help you with today, Ms. Tillman? Your case reference number is M-T-B dash two-one-zero-zero-three-six-one, and you'll receive a brief survey after we hang up — your feedback is genuinely useful. Thank you for choosing Meridian Trust Bank.
